dict.string: MiWarp needs access to your Documents folder to open and manage coding projects.
MiWarp needs access to your Downloads folder to open and manage coding projects.
MiWarp needs access to your Desktop folder to open and manage coding projects.
MiWarp needs access to removable volumes to open and manage coding projects on external drives.
MiWarp needs access to network volumes to open and manage coding projects on shared drives.
